current_phase: canonical repo cleanup and memory initialization
summary: BrandBuild / AI Video remains the canonical production repo for the shared AI video product family. Misplaced BYOR roof-measure runtime source was removed from this repo and archived into BYOR reference storage. The repo still has minor unrelated local changes outside that cleanup.
current_priorities: Keep this repo focused on BrandBuild / AI Video.
Resolve naming drift between README branding and package naming when appropriate.
Track remaining unrelated local changes separately from cleanup work.
risks: Naming drift can confuse repo ownership and release communication.
Unrelated local changes may complicate future cleanup commits.
assumptions: BrandBuild and AI Video are the same product family.
known_issues: Root package name still uses ai-video-studio while README and product identity use BrandBuild.
There are unrelated modified/untracked files already present in the repo.
recent_changes: Removed roof-measure source trees and the new-scan page from the dashboard app.
Updated the forbidden-reference script to neutral BrandBuild / AI Video messaging.
next_steps: Decide whether to align package naming with BrandBuild branding or keep the shared AI Video naming intentionally.
Keep the repo free of BYOR-owned runtime features.
Update .project-memory files as future product work lands.
